items.title: Trump rings Wall Street opening bells and says the stock market ‘is going to go through the roof’
items.description: Trump used the occasion to promote the launch of “Trump accounts,” which are special investment accounts for children under age 18.

items.title: TeraWulf’s stock surges after a $19 billion deal with Anthropic
items.description: The deal “validates” the crypto-mining company’s pivot to supporting the AI buildout, its CEO said.

items.title: ‘The money would have been life-changing’: My father told my grandmother to slash my inheritance. Is that fair?
items.description: “I could have bought a home for what I hope will be a growing family.”

items.title: How parents can take advantage of the ‘best summer-camp tax break in years’
items.description: For many kids, summer means camp. For many of their parents, that means financial juggling to pay for those camp experiences.

items.title: As oil exits the ‘danger zone,’ here’s what history suggests happens next for stocks
items.description: The swift pullback in oil prices is a tailwind for the economy, says Evercore ISI

items.title: Global stocks may be headed for a summer swoon. Why AI won’t be the only story that matters, JPMorgan says
items.description: Strategists at the investment bank outlined five key drivers for global equities in the months ahead

items.title: Your investing expectations are more than double the reality. Here is the tough truth.
items.description: Long-term real returns above 10% annualized are exceedingly rare.

items.title: AI hyperscalers are poised for a big comeback rally as chip gains cool, says Morgan Stanley
items.description: The once-hot semiconductor trade has seen a cooling in the last couple of weeks, which is not only likely to continue, but usher in a bumpy ride for the overall stock market.

items.title: You want a portfolio that matches your morals. But that could sink your retirement plans.
items.description: More investors want their money to reflect their values. It feels righteous — but the reality is a lot messier.

items.title: I have no kids. Will I cause family drama by leaving different amounts to my nieces and nephews?
items.description: “Part of me would prefer to leave more to those for whom the money could make a meaningful difference.”
